questions.question: Does AppState initializer in main.ts set backendState to null (not { state: 'loading' })?
questions.actionable_check: Read src-tauri/ui/main.ts lines 29-47; confirm backendState: null; confirm no string 'loading' in the initial state block
evidence_required: Code excerpt showing backendState: null in AppState initializer
Confirmation that no string 'loading' appears in the initial state
questions.pass_criteria: backendState: null in AppState initializer, no hardcoded 'loading' string in initial state block

questions.question: Does updateLoadingOverlayForState guard against null backendState without throwing TypeError?
questions.actionable_check: Read updateLoadingOverlayForState in main.ts; confirm null check at top before accessing state.backendState.state
evidence_required: Code excerpt showing null guard in updateLoadingOverlayForState
Confirmation that the function returns early when backendState is null
questions.pass_criteria: Function has null guard before dereferencing state.backendState.state

questions.question: Does the isAlreadyGenerating guard in next() handle null backendState as false?
questions.actionable_check: Read next() function in main.ts around line 1008; confirm null check before accessing state.backendState.state
evidence_required: Code excerpt showing null-safe isAlreadyGenerating computation
Confirmation that null backendState results in isAlreadyGenerating=false
questions.pass_criteria: isAlreadyGenerating evaluates to false (not throws) when state.backendState is null

questions.question: Does the delete error handler guard against null backendState when restoring prompt?
questions.actionable_check: Read the delete error handler in main.ts (around line 1117); confirm null check before accessing state.backendState.state
evidence_required: Code excerpt showing null guard in delete error handler
Confirmation that state.backendState is checked for null before .state access
questions.pass_criteria: Delete error handler guards against null backendState before accessing .state

questions.question: Is the BackendState type in types.ts updated to BackendState | null?
questions.actionable_check: Read src-tauri/ui/types.ts AppState interface; confirm backendState: BackendState | null
evidence_required: Code excerpt from types.ts showing backendState: BackendState | null
questions.pass_criteria: types.ts AppState.backendState is typed as BackendState | null

Confirmation that test starts with null and verifies loading after event
questions.pass_criteria: AC-011 test exists and verifies null → loading transition
